args.code: (() => { try { const r1 = roundGameState(); if(r1) return JSON.stringify({source:'roundGameState',data:r1}); } catch(e){} try { const r2 = localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1') || localStorage.getItem('farmSave'); if(r2) return JSON.stringify({source:'localStorage',data:JSON.parse(r2)}); } catch(e){} return JSON.stringify({localStorageKeys:Object.keys(localStorage)}); })()
